---
id: delete-stream
title: "DeleteASRStream"
description: "Delete the specified stream from the ASR task. Only effective when the RecognitionRange parameter is set to 1."
api: 
info_path: extended_services/cloud-realtime-asr/en/server/api-reference/open-api-desc
---

<h1 className={"openapi__heading"}>DeleteASRStream</h1>

<MethodEndpoint method={"post"} path={"/"}></MethodEndpoint>


Delete the specified stream from the ASR task. Only effective when the RecognitionRange parameter is set to 1.
## Request
<details style={{"marginBottom":"1rem"}} className={"openapi-markdown__details"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-params"}>Query Parameters</h3></summary><div><ul><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Action","in":"query","description":"> API prototype parameter\n>\n> https://cloud-realtime-asr-api.zegotech.cn?Action=DeleteASRStream\n","required":true,"allowEmptyValue":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["DeleteASRStream"]},"style":"form","explode":true}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"AppId","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Application ID, assigned by ZEGOCLOUD. Get it from the [ZEGOCLOUD Admin Console](https://console.zegocloud.com/).","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"uint32"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureNonce","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. 16-bit hexadecimal random string (hex encoding of 8 bytes of random number). For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Timestamp","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Current Unix timestamp, in seconds. For generation algorithm, refer to <a href=\"/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-example\">Signature Example</a>, maximum allowed deviation of 10 minutes.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"integer","format":"int64"}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"SignatureVersion","in":"query","description":"💡Public parameter. Signature version number.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","default":"2.0","enum":["2.0"]}}}></ParamsItem><ParamsItem className={"paramsItem"} param={{"name":"Signature","in":"query","description":"Common parameter. Signature, used to verify the legitimacy of the request. Please refer to [Signature Mechanism](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/accessing-server-apis#signature-mechanism) to generate.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}}></ParamsItem></ul></div></details>
<MimeTabs className={"openapi-tabs__mime request"}><TabItem label={"application/json"} value={"application/json-schema"}><details style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details mime"} data-collapsed={false} open={true}><summary style={{}} className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-mime"}><h3 className={"openapi-markdown__details-summary-header-body"}>Body</h3><strong className={"openapi-schema__required"}>required</strong></summary><ul className={"request-schema-first-body-node-container"}><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"TaskId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Unique identifier of the task.","example":"1920370518175780864"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"StreamId"} required={true} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"The stream ID to be recognized.","example":"streamId1"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Sequence"} required={false} schemaName={"int64"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Request sequence number, used to guarantee the ordering of add and delete operations on the same stream. The backend only processes the request with the latest Sequence. If not set, requests are processed in the order received by the backend.\n> 📌 **Important**\n> The Sequence values for AddASRStream and DeleteASRStream must be sequential. For example:\n> 1. AddASRStream(Sequence:1)\n> 2. DeleteASRStream(Sequence:2)\n> 3. AddASRStream(Sequence:3)\n> 4. DeleteASRStream(Sequence:4)\n> 5. ...\n"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem></MimeTabs>

For details, refer to [Return Codes](/cloud-realtime-asr/api-reference/return-codes).","example":0}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"Message"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Request result description.","example":"success"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"RequestId"} required={false} schemaName={"string"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"string","description":"Request ID.","example":"6710396424239903698"}}></SchemaItem></ul></details></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example (from schema)"} value={"Example (from schema)"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"6710396424239903698\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem><TabItem label={"Example"} value={"Example"}><ResponseSamples responseExample={"{\n  \"Code\": 0,\n  \"Message\": \"success\",\n  \"RequestId\": \"6710396424239903698\"\n}"} language={"json"}></ResponseSamples></TabItem></SchemaTabs></TabItem></MimeTabs></div></TabItem></ApiTabs></div></div>
